product_overview: Personal Tracker is a desktop productivity app for planning the week, logging time blocks, and tracking habits in a unified workspace. It uses local caching plus Supabase sync to keep weekly activity, backlog items, and progress available across sessions.
core_goals: Sign in to access a personal productivity workspace
Plan and organize tasks for the week
Log daily work blocks and time spent on activities
Track habit progress against weekly targets
Review productivity trends and activity distribution

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Sign in to the app with Google-based authentication so the user can access their personal data and synced workspace.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Start sign-in with Google -> Complete authentication in the browser -> Return to the app and see the workspace load

features.name: Weekly Tracker
features.description: Manage weekly planning and daily task logging from the main workspace, including switching between planning views and adding work blocks.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Switch between Overview, Weekly log, Stack, and Review views -> Add a new work block -> Select a category -> Choose a duration -> See the new block appear in the weekly log
Navigate to / -> Open the weekly log view -> Add a new work block -> Select a category -> Choose a duration -> See the logged block reflected in the daily timeline

features.name: Habits Management
features.description: Create and maintain habits with weekly targets, then mark progress from the daily tracking cards.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open habits management -> Add a new habit -> Set a weekly target -> Save the habit -> See it available for tracking on daily cards
Navigate to / -> Open habits management -> Review existing habits -> Track habit completion from a daily card -> See the habit progress update

features.name: Productivity Insights
features.description: Review visual summaries of productivity, including heatmaps and focus distribution charts.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the Insights tab -> View the heatmap -> View the focus distribution chart -> Review productivity trends over time

routes.description: Main application page with multiple tabs (Overview, Weekly log, Stack, Review, Insights)

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login with Google using Supabase Auth

features.name: Weekly Tracker
user_interactions: Click tabs to switch between Overview, Weekly log, Stack, etc.
Click "Log block" to add a new task

features.name: Habits Management
user_interactions: Click Habits button to open management modal
Add new habits with target days per week

known_limitations.issue: Requires Supabase connection for data sync
known_limitations.impact: May fail if offline or database is unreachable
